allow: Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/mintplex-labs/anything-llm/git/trees/main?recursive=1" | python3 -c "import json,sys; tree=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['path']\) for i in tree['tree'] if 'agent' in i['path'].lower\(\) or 'skill' in i['path'].lower\(\)]" 2>&1 | head -80)
Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/mintplex-labs/anything-llm/branches" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(b['name']\) for b in data]" 2>&1 | head -10)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/mintplex-labs/anything-llm/branches" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(b['name']\) for b in data]" 2>&1 | grep -i "master\\|main\\|dev\\|develop\\|release" | head -10)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/mintplex-labs/anything-llm/git/trees/master?recursive=1" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['path']\) for i in data.get\('tree',[]\) if 'agent' in i['path'].lower\(\) or 'skill' in i['path'].lower\(\)]" 2>&1 | head -80)
